title: Annual Premium Calculation
description: The system shall calculate annual employee premium as monthly premium multiplied by 12. Annual Premium = Monthly Premium × 12. The monthly premium stored on the coverage tier is the authoritative source.
acceptanceCriteria: Annual premium equals monthly premium × 12 for all plans
Annual premium is recalculated when monthly premium changes
Annual premium is displayed on enrollment confirmation

title: Pay-Period Deduction Calculation
description: The system shall calculate payroll deductions based on the employee's configured payroll frequency using the formula: Pay-Period Deduction = (Monthly Premium × 12) ÷ Pay Periods Per Year. This is NOT Monthly Premium ÷ 2 for biweekly — that formula is incorrect and produces a different result.

title: Supported Pay Frequencies
description: The system shall support the following payroll frequencies with their corresponding annual pay period counts: Weekly (52), Biweekly (26), Semi-Monthly (24), Monthly (12).

title: Deduction Rounding
description: The system shall round payroll deductions to two decimal places using half-up rounding. Formula: ROUND((Monthly Premium × 12) ÷ PayPeriodsPerYear, 2).
acceptanceCriteria: All deduction amounts are rounded to 2 decimal places
Rounding method is half-up (0.005 rounds up)
Rounding method is configurable at employer level

title: Final-Pay-Period True-Up
description: The system shall perform a final-pay-period true-up to ensure total annual employee deductions equal the annual premium exactly. The final pay period deduction = Annual Premium - Sum of Prior Pay-Period Deductions. A configurable maximum adjustment threshold prevents unexpected large adjustments.

title: Prorated Premium for Mid-Year Enrollment
description: The system shall support prorated premium calculations for employees enrolling after the plan year begins and for qualifying life events. Remaining Premium = Monthly Premium × Remaining Coverage Months. Pay-period deduction is then calculated using the remaining pay periods for the year.

title: Separate Employee and Employer Contribution Calculation
description: The system shall calculate employee and employer contributions independently. Employee premium = Total premium - Employer contribution. Payroll deduction is based on employee contribution only. Carrier funding amount is based on employer contribution × coverage period.

title: Premium Calculation Audit Trail
description: The system shall retain an auditable calculation trace for every payroll deduction showing: source monthly premium, annualization factor, pay frequency, pay periods per year, unrounded amount, rounding method, rounded amount, and true-up adjustment if applicable. This trace supports payroll reconciliation and exception investigation.
